coordination_source_verdict: official generated/rule-kinematic report metric; human expert coordination rating not proven
rationale: All 150 approved top-five plan cells have clean unique replay/session/case mapping and trajectory presence for ego plus counterpart.
Missingness for the plan cohort is zero; full-universe missingness is analyzed separately and flagged as selection-bias risk.
Outcome source is characterized from raw diagnosis PDFs and SQL fields without claiming expert-rated coordination.
Beijing/Shanghai comparability is stated within evidence limits.
Full 20-team universe is not passed because T18/T19 replay/source mapping is broken and some full-universe sessions have missing case IDs.
authorizes_next_step: Gate -1 independent reviewer, then Gate 0 only for approved top-five cohort if reviewer concurs
